name: Goatcounter
description:
Lightweight web analytics platform.

Docs: https://www.goatcounter.com/help?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  goatcounter:
    image: arp242/goatcounter:2.7
    volumes:
      - goatcounter-data:/home/goatcounter/goatcounter-data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - wget -qO- http://127.0.0.1:8080/status >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 1
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42045:8080
volumes:
  goatcounter-data: null
